title: lonicera chrysantha f. regeliana
intro: Lonicera chrysantha f. regeliana, also known as Golden Honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species within the Honeysuckle family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lonicera chrysantha f. regeliana include relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Herbal preparations of Golden Honeysuckle often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make tea, syrup, or other medicinal remedies.
